fields.name: Dilnoza Karimova
fields.quote: QuizNova helped me turn revision into live, competitive sessions. My students now participate more and I can spot weak topics immediately.
fields.quote_uz: QuizNova takrorlash jarayonini jonli va raqobatbardosh darsga aylantirdi. Talabalarim faolroq qatnashmoqda va qaysi mavzular sustligini darhol ko'raman.
fields.quote_ru: QuizNova превратил повторение в живые соревновательные занятия. Студенты участвуют активнее, а слабые темы видны сразу.
fields.quote_en: QuizNova helped me turn revision into live, competitive sessions. My students now participate more and I can spot weak topics immediately.

fields.name: Azizbek Rakhimov
fields.quote: The weekly challenge keeps me practicing outside class. I like that I can see where I improve instead of just getting a raw score.
fields.quote_uz: Haftalik challenge meni darsdan tashqarida ham mashq qilishga undaydi. Faqat ball emas, qaysi joyim yaxshilanayotganini ko'ra olaman.
fields.quote_ru: Еженедельный челлендж помогает мне тренироваться вне занятий. Я вижу не только балл, но и то, в чем стал лучше.
fields.quote_en: The weekly challenge keeps me practicing outside class. I like that I can see where I improve instead of just getting a raw score.

fields.name: Mavluda Sodiqova
fields.quote: I finally have a clear picture of my child's progress. The reports are simple to understand and give us better study conversations at home.
fields.quote_uz: Farzandimning o'zlashtirishini endi aniq ko'ra olaman. Hisobotlar tushunarli va uyda samarali suhbat qilishimizga yordam beradi.
fields.quote_ru: Теперь я четко вижу прогресс ребенка. Отчеты понятные и помогают нам лучше обсуждать учебу дома.
fields.quote_en: I finally have a clear picture of my child's progress. The reports are simple to understand and give us better study conversations at home.

fields.title: Algorithm Sprint: Arrays and Complexity
fields.description: Join this week's challenge to solve a focused set of algorithm questions, compare your accuracy, and unlock a mentor review for top performers.
fields.description_uz: Bu haftadagi challenge orqali algoritmlar bo'yicha tanlangan savollarni yeching, aniqligingizni taqqoslang va eng yaxshi ishtirokchilar uchun mentor tahliliga ega bo'ling.
fields.description_ru: Присоединяйтесь к челленджу недели: решайте отобранные задачи по алгоритмам, сравнивайте точность и получите разбор от ментора для лучших участников.
fields.description_en: Join this week's challenge to solve a focused set of algorithm questions, compare your accuracy, and unlock a mentor review for top performers.
fields.reward: Top 10 receive a verified achievement badge and featured leaderboard placement.
fields.reward_uz: Top-10 ishtirokchi tasdiqlangan badge va featured leaderboard joyini oladi.
fields.reward_ru: Топ-10 получат подтвержденный бейдж и место в выделенном рейтинге.
fields.reward_en: Top 10 receive a verified achievement badge and featured leaderboard placement.
